title: The Log Is The Agent - Ishaan Sehgal, Omnara
summary: Ishaan Sehgal argues that agent identity and continuity should be centered on session logs as the persistent primitive, rather than on models, frameworks, or tools. As LLMs commoditize, durable and portable logs become the infrastructure differentiator, enabling durability, continuity, forkability, and portability across model providers and runtimes.
